name: 01 - Candidate Import (CSV / Webhook)
description: Accepts candidate records from an approved external source (e.g. a client-authorised HR system API, uploaded CSV webhook, or internal data feed), normalises the payload, and posts it to the backend webhook endpoint. IMPORTANT: This workflow does NOT scrape LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, JobStreet or any other job portal. Only use with data sources you have legal authorisation to access.
_notes: AUTHORISED DATA SOURCES ONLY. Supported: client HR system APIs, uploaded CSVs via webhook, internal data migration feeds. NOT supported: LinkedIn scraping, Indeed scraping, or any unauthorised portal extraction.
